title: Belzebuth Nether Kingdom
description: Adds a news structure to the Nether, The Belzebuth Castle, along with a new Boss, New Tools, New Items, New Enemies and New Music Discs!
body:
# Belzebuth Nether Kingdom (BETA)🔥


**The DataPack** adds **Belzebuth Castle**, a structure to the Nether along with a new **Items Customs**, **Weapons**, **Armors**, **Advancements**, **New Enemies** and a **New Music Discs!** 

![Belxebuth Promo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/254c3e9a9578b4fa6d2a9561ad886e40fa8c145c.jpeg)
> **LuisterCorp © - 2025**


## Notas📝 (Notes)
- **Belzebuth Nether Kingdom** is **translated into both English - Spanish - German(Deutsch)📇**
- **Belzebuth Nether Kingdom** is **compatible** with versions **1.21.5 (BETA)**🏷️
- **Belzebuth Nether Kingdom** adds new Nether and Overworld **(structures)** to world generation🌐
- **Belzebuth Nether Kingdom** is compatible with any **generation Datapack in the World**
- **Use Headphone** for a **better experience** 🎧

## More Details Soon (It is currently undergoing bug fixes and compatibility improvements.)..
